name: qa-agents
description: Multi-agent orchestrated QA platform — GitHub Copilot Extension for VS Code

scripts.setup: npm install && npx playwright install chromium && node -e "if(!require('fs').existsSync('.env')){require('fs').copyFileSync('.env.example','.env');console.log('Created .env from template — fill in your API keys before running.')}"
scripts.postinstall: node -e "try{require('fs').existsSync('node_modules/playwright')&&console.log('Run: npm run setup  (installs Playwright browsers + .env)')}catch(e){}"
